componentComplexityLevels.name: static-building-block
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Simple visual piece with minimal props and no meaningful state.

componentComplexityLevels.name: reusable-shared-ui-component
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Reusable card, panel, row, or item component.

componentComplexityLevels.name: composed-section-component
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Section built from multiple smaller parts.

componentComplexityLevels.name: data-driven-component
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Component renders from arrays, schemas, or structured data.

componentComplexityLevels.name: app-specific-integrated-component
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Component connects to app-level data types or services.

componentComplexityLevels.name: state-heavy-interactive-component
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Component has complex UI state or interaction rules.

componentComplexityLevels.name: domain-specific-workflow-component
componentComplexityLevels.definition: Component handles business-specific flow, validation, and external integrations.
